title: Encoded / Obfuscated PowerShell
description: Detects encoded/obfuscated PowerShell execution (4688/4104) using base64, hidden window, download cradles and bypass flags.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, username AS account, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentDevice=WindowsLog%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4688%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4104%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%powershell%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%pwsh%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-enc%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-encodedcommand%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%frombase64string%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%downloadstring%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%iex %' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-nop%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-w hidden%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%bypass%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
